name: hud-character-status-msgdatfix
desc: Repoint FUN_0058d140 lower-left HUD stat label away from constmsg group 0x67/sub7 (login/account error) to the Japanese-reference stat label group 0x62/sub5 (体力/체력).
verified: Reference screenshot .omo/reference/toshichan.my.coocan.jp/ddcc72_status.jpg shows the lower-left character HUD first row as 体力, PCP, MCP, 航続, not キャラクターステータス. MsgDat layout confirms constmsg record 2995 = 体力, group 0x62 sub5; record 2968 = キャラクターステータス, group 0x60 sub7, belongs to a different character-status screen title. RE site FUN_0058d140 originally hardcodes push 7; push 0x67 before writing the HUD label, which made the Korean client show the account-error string 이미 탈퇴하셨습니다.

patches.note: FUN_0058d140 lower-left HUD stat label subId: 7 -> 5 (constmsg group 0x62 sub5 = 体力/체력)
FUN_0058d140 lower-left HUD stat label group: 0x67 login/account errors -> 0x62 stat labels
